name: Voltage Drums
explanation: A fully-synthesized analog drum machine. Seven one-shot voices are generated purely by oscillators and filtered noise — kick (pitch-swept sine with a click), snare (tuned sines plus band-passed noise), closed and open hats (a metallic square-oscillator cluster through a high band-pass), clap, tom and cowbell. Each incoming note triggers a voice, and the controls shape tuning, decays, snap, tone and accent.
